nemetonshiny 0.115.12.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Enrich the radar indicator sf with a live R5 dépérissement column

Source: R/service_r5.R
add_r5_to_indicators.Rd

Best-effort: returns `base_sf` unchanged when there is no bound monitoring zone, no reachable DB, or no dieback alert. The added column is named `indicateur_r5_deperissement` (raw, "high = dieback") so `nemeton::create_family_index()` detects it via the core `INDICATOR_FAMILIES$R` config and inverts it for the radar.

Usage

add_r5_to_indicators(base_sf, project)

Arguments

base_sf

The per-UGF indicator `sf` (`project$indicators_sf`).

project

The current project (reads `metadata$monitoring_zone_id`).

Value

`base_sf`, possibly with an added `indicateur_r5_deperissement` column (NA on UGFs with no intersecting alert / no routed method).

On this page
